product_name: Toro 570Z Installation Guide Nozzle Kit – 15 Nozzle Assortment

Product long description.value: The Toro 570Z Nozzle Assortment Kit includes 15 of the most popular Toro 570 Series fixed-pattern spray nozzles in a convenient reusable storage case. Contains a full range of arcs (90, 180, 360 degrees) and radii (4 to 15 ft) for quick on-site nozzle changes and system tune-ups.

Feature Bullets 1.value: Includes 15 of the most popular Toro 570 Series fixed-pattern spray nozzles

Feature Bullets 2.value: Comes in a convenient reusable storage case

Feature Bullets 3.value: Contains a full range of arcs (90, 180, 360 degrees) and radii (4 to 15 ft)

Final Description.value: The Toro 570Z Nozzle Assortment Kit includes 15 of the most popular Toro 570 Series fixed-pattern spray nozzles in a convenient reusable storage case.
